action: Schedule automatic execution of the full news video generation and monitoring workflow every two hours; for each news story, track its updates until closure and append a timestamped entry for each event using the available metadata structure.
fallback_action: Notify user with an error message if scheduling or tracking fails.

recipe.steps: Create a scheduled job to execute the workflow encompassing actions 1 through 7 every two hours using the scheduling tool.

Track each news story (identified by genre or conv_id) by maintaining an array of event entries. Each time a story is updated or processed at any stage (e.g., script creation, video generation, video status update), append a timestamped entry to the story's array in memory.
For all relevant operations, retrieve and update data for stories and metadata using memory tools as appropriate to maintain full context and history per-story.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Execute the end-to-end news video curation flow for all genres, track updates for each story until closure, and maintain timestamped logs for each event.
